brief: Today is Pull day A: deadlifts, lat pulldowns, wide cable rows, and arms. It's the first Pull session of the new build block, so most weights step up from your July 17 calibration numbers (those were run about 10% light on purpose). Deadlift: work up to 265 for your three top sets, up from 255. The load trainer wanted 285 on the theory your calibration lifts were held light, but you're in a cut and only hit the bottom of the rep range last time, so I'm taking one clean step — earn 265 for 5 (and bank toward 6) before we jump again. Lat pulldown goes to 150 for the working sets, cable row nudges to 100.5 (that's the top pin plus the small 3 lb add-on), and dumbbell curls hold at 30 for all three sets — last time your third set slipped to 25, keep it at 30. Cable hammer curls stay at 17.5, but the job there is reps: you got 8s last time, I want a full 10 on every set. Face pulls hold 27.5 for both sets of 15. Nothing hurts in your log and your rest looked normal, so push where the weight went up; treat set one of each lift as a feeler. One planning note for a future session, not for today: your Pull A day gives biceps 6 sets but the mid-back row only 3 — worth adding a 4th row set or trimming a curl variation. You're down to 206 on the cut, so keep the protein up and stay hydrated.

overrides.reason: First build-block deadlift and you're in a cut — one clean +10 step to 265, not the bigger jump the raw numbers suggest; earn 265 for 5 and bank toward 6 before we add more.
Your July 17 pulldowns were calibration numbers held about 10% light; restoring the working sets to 150, a machine you can safely push near failure.
You're already at the stack's top pin (97.5) and hit the rep range last time, so the only step up is the +3 micro to 100.5; aim for a clean 10 on each set.
Last time your third set slipped from 30 down to 25 — hold 30 for all three this time before the rack jumps to 35.
Weight stays at 17.5 — the job is reps: you stalled at 8s last time, I want a full 10 on every set before the load moves.
You proved 27.5x15 on Thursday's push day, so both sets hold 27.5 for a full 15 here.
